:docinfo:
// Doctype should always be article
:doctype:     article

// URLS
// use stand-alone only, not as part of URLs, see Style Guide
:dsc:                        https://documentation.suse.com
:beta-www:                   https://susedoc.github.io
:doo:                        https://doc.opensuse.org
:sc-rn:                      https://www.suse.com/releasenotes

:ndash:                      &#x02013;

// Formatting in GitLab
:toc:
:toc-placement: auto
:toc-title: Índice
:icons:
:lang: en
:numbered:
:show-link-uri:

// special characters
:mdash: —
:nbh: ‑
:nbsp:
:nbzwsp: ﻿
:zwsp: ​
:thrdmrk: *

// For support tables: +supported/-unsupported character
:sup: &#43;
:uns: ‒

// users and groups
:exampleuserfull:            Tux Linux
:exampleuser:                tux
:examplegroup:               usuários
:rootuser:                   root

:prompt_user:                >{nbsp}
